verses.latin_vulgate: Laudatio ipsi David.   Exaltabo te, Deus meus rex,  et benedicam nomini tuo in sæculum, et in sæculum sæculi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תְּהִלָּ֗ה לְדָ֫וִ֥ד אֲרוֹמִמְךָ֣ אֱלוֹהַ֣י הַמֶּ֑לֶךְ וַאֲבָרְכָ֥ה שִׁ֝מְךָ֗ לְעוֹלָ֥ם וָעֶֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Praise, for David himself. I will extol thee, O God my king: and I will bless thy name for ever; yea, for ever and ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin kiitos. Minä ylistän sinua, Jumalani, sinä kuningas, ja kiitän sinun nimeäs aina ja ijankaikkiseti.
verses.king_james: I will extol thee, my God, O king; and I will bless thy name for ever and ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Per singulos dies benedicam tibi,  et laudabo nomen tuum in sæculum, et in sæculum sæculi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּכׇל־י֥וֹם אֲבָרְכֶ֑ךָּ וַאֲהַלְלָ֥ה שִׁ֝מְךָ֗ לְעוֹלָ֥ם וָעֶֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Every day will I bless thee: and I will praise thy name for ever; yea, for ever and ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka päivä minä kunnioitan sinua, ja kiitän sinun nimeäs aina ja ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: Every day will I bless thee; and I will praise thy name for ever and ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Magnus Dominus, et laudabilis nimis,  et magnitudinis ejus non est finis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גָּ֘ד֤וֹל יְהֹוָ֣ה וּמְהֻלָּ֣ל מְאֹ֑ד וְ֝לִגְדֻלָּת֗וֹ אֵ֣ין חֵֽקֶר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Great is the Lord, and greatly to be praised: and of his greatness there is no end.
verses.finnish_biblia: Suuri on Herra, ja sangen kunniallinen, ja hänen suuruutensa on sanomatoin.
verses.king_james: Great is the Lord, and greatly to be praised; and his greatness is unsearchable.

verses.latin_vulgate: Generatio et generatio laudabit opera tua,  et potentiam tuam pronuntiabunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דּ֣וֹר לְ֭דוֹר יְשַׁבַּ֣ח מַעֲשֶׂ֑יךָ וּגְב֖וּרֹתֶ֣יךָ יַגִּֽידוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Generation and generation shall praise thy works: and they shall declare thy power.
verses.finnish_biblia: Suku pitää suvulle jutteleman sinun töitäs, ja sinun voimastas puhuman.
verses.king_james: One generation shall praise thy works to another, and shall declare thy mighty acts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Magnificentiam gloriæ sanctitatis tuæ loquentur,  et mirabilia tua narrabunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲ֭דַר כְּב֣וֹד הוֹדֶ֑ךָ וְדִבְרֵ֖י נִפְלְאֹתֶ֣יךָ אָשִֽׂיחָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: They shall speak of the magnificence of the glory of thy holiness: and shall tell thy wondrous works.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä ajattelen sinun suuren kunnias kauneutta ja sinun ihmeitäs;
verses.king_james: I will speak of the glorious honour of thy majesty, and of thy wondrous works.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et virtutem terribilium tuorum dicent,  et magnitudinem tuam narrabunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וֶעֱז֣וּז נֽוֹרְאֹתֶ֣יךָ יֹאמֵ֑רוּ (וגדלותיך) [וּגְדֻלָּתְךָ֥] אֲסַפְּרֶֽנָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they shall speak of the might of thy terrible acts: and shall declare thy greatness.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että puhuttaisiin sinun ihmeellisten töittes voimasta: ja sinun suurta herrauttas minä juttelen;
verses.king_james: And men shall speak of the might of thy terrible acts: and I will declare thy greatness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Memoriam abundantiæ suavitatis tuæ eructabunt,  et justitia tua exsultabunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֵ֣כֶר רַב־טוּבְךָ֣ יַבִּ֑יעוּ וְצִדְקָתְךָ֥ יְרַנֵּֽנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: They shall publish the memory of the abundance of thy sweetness: and shall rejoice in thy justice.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että sinun suuren hyvyytes muisto ylistettäisiin, ja sinun vanhurskautes kiitettäisiin.
verses.king_james: They shall abundantly utter the memory of thy great goodness, and shall sing of thy righteousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Miserator et misericors Dominus :  patiens, et multum misericors.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חַנּ֣וּן וְרַח֣וּם יְהֹוָ֑ה אֶ֥רֶךְ אַ֝פַּ֗יִם וּגְדׇל־חָֽסֶד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord is gracious and merciful: patient and plenteous in mercy.
verses.finnish_biblia: Armollinen ja laupias on Herra, hidas vihaan ja sangen hyvä.
verses.king_james: The Lord is gracious, and full of compassion; slow to anger, and of great mercy.

verses.latin_vulgate: Suavis Dominus universis,  et miserationes ejus super omnia opera ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: טוֹב־יְהֹוָ֥ה לַכֹּ֑ל וְ֝רַחֲמָ֗יו עַל־כׇּל־מַעֲשָֽׂיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord is sweet to all: and his tender mercies are over all his works.
verses.finnish_biblia: Suloinen on Herra kaikille, ja armahtaa kaikkia tekojansa.
verses.king_james: The Lord is good to all: and his tender mercies are over all his works.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confiteantur tibi, Domine, omnia opera tua,  et sancti tui benedicant tibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יוֹד֣וּךָ יְ֭הֹוָה כׇּל־מַעֲשֶׂ֑יךָ וַ֝חֲסִידֶ֗יךָ יְבָרְכֽוּכָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let all thy works, O Lord, praise thee: and let thy saints bless thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiittäkään sinua, Herra, kaikki sinun tekos, ja sinun pyhäs kiittäkään sinua;
verses.king_james: All thy works shall praise thee, O Lord; and thy saints shall bless thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Gloriam regni tui dicent,  et potentiam tuam loquentur :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּב֣וֹד מַלְכוּתְךָ֣ יֹאמֵ֑רוּ וּגְבוּרָתְךָ֥ יְדַבֵּֽרוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: They shall speak of the glory of thy kingdom: and shall tell of thy power:
verses.finnish_biblia: Julistakaan sinun valtakuntas kunniaa, ja puhukaa sinun voimastas.
verses.king_james: They shall speak of the glory of thy kingdom, and talk of thy power;

verses.latin_vulgate: ut notam faciant filiis hominum potentiam tuam,  et gloriam magnificentiæ regni tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְהוֹדִ֤יעַ ׀ לִבְנֵ֣י הָ֭אָדָם גְּבוּרֹתָ֑יו וּ֝כְב֗וֹד הֲדַ֣ר מַלְכוּתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: To make thy might known to the sons of men: and the glory of the magnificence of thy kingdom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että sinun voimas tulis ihmisten lapsille tiettäväksi, ja sinun valtakuntas suuri kunnia.
verses.king_james: To make known to the sons of men his mighty acts, and the glorious majesty of his kingdom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Regnum tuum regnum omnium sæculorum ;  et dominatio tua in omni generatione et generationem.  Fidelis Dominus in omnibus verbis suis,  et sanctus in omnibus operibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַֽלְכוּתְךָ֗ מַלְכ֥וּת כׇּל־עֹלָמִ֑ים וּ֝מֶֽמְשַׁלְתְּךָ֗ בְּכׇל־דּ֥וֹר וָדֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thy kingdom is a kingdom of all ages: and thy dominion endureth throughout all generations. The Lord is faithful in all his words: and holy in all his works.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinun valtakuntas on ijankaikkinen valtakunta, ja sinun herrautes pysyy suvusta sukuun.
verses.king_james: Thy kingdom is an everlasting kingdom, and thy dominion endureth throughout all generations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Allevat Dominus omnes qui corruunt,  et erigit omnes elisos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: סוֹמֵ֣ךְ יְ֭הֹוָה לְכׇל־הַנֹּפְלִ֑ים וְ֝זוֹקֵ֗ף לְכׇל־הַכְּפוּפִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord lifteth up all that fall: and setteth up all that are cast down.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra tukee kaikkia kaatuvaisia, ja nostaa kaikkia sullotuita.
verses.king_james: The Lord upholdeth all that fall, and raiseth up all those that be bowed down.

verses.latin_vulgate: Oculi omnium in te sperant, Domine,  et tu das escam illorum in tempore opportuno.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֵֽינֵי־כֹ֭ל אֵלֶ֣יךָ יְשַׂבֵּ֑רוּ וְאַתָּ֤ה נֽוֹתֵן־לָהֶ֖ם אֶת־אׇכְלָ֣ם בְּעִתּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The eyes of all hope in thee, O Lord: and thou givest them meat in due season.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kaikkein silmät vartioitsevat sinua, ja sinä annat heille ruan ajallansa.
verses.king_james: The eyes of all wait upon thee; and thou givest them their meat in due season.

verses.latin_vulgate: Aperis tu manum tuam,  et imples omne animal benedictione.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פּוֹתֵ֥חַ אֶת־יָדֶ֑ךָ וּמַשְׂבִּ֖יעַ לְכׇל־חַ֣י רָצֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou openest thy hand, and fillest with blessing every living creature.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinä avaat kätes, ja ravitset kaikki, kuin elävät, suosiolla.
verses.king_james: Thou openest thine hand, and satisfiest the desire of every living thing.

verses.latin_vulgate: Justus Dominus in omnibus viis suis,  et sanctus in omnibus operibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צַדִּ֣יק יְ֭הֹוָה בְּכׇל־דְּרָכָ֑יו וְ֝חָסִ֗יד בְּכׇל־מַעֲשָֽׂיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord is just in all his ways: and holy in all his works.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vanhurskas on Herra kaikissa teissänsä, ja laupias kaikissa töissänsä.
verses.king_james: The Lord is righteous in all his ways, and holy in all his works.

verses.latin_vulgate: Prope est Dominus omnibus invocantibus eum,  omnibus invocantibus eum in veritate.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קָר֣וֹב יְ֭הֹוָה לְכׇל־קֹרְאָ֑יו לְכֹ֤ל אֲשֶׁ֖ר יִקְרָאֻ֣הוּ בֶאֱמֶֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord is nigh unto all them that call upon him: to all that call upon him in truth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Läsnä on Herra kaikkia, jotka häntä avuksensa huutavat, kaikkia, jotka totuudessa häntä avuksensa huutavat.
verses.king_james: The Lord is nigh unto all them that call upon him, to all that call upon him in truth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Voluntatem timentium se faciet,  et deprecationem eorum exaudiet, et salvos faciet eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רְצוֹן־יְרֵאָ֥יו יַעֲשֶׂ֑ה וְֽאֶת־שַׁוְעָתָ֥ם יִ֝שְׁמַ֗ע וְיוֹשִׁיעֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He will do the will of them that fear him: and he will hear their prayer, and save them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän tekee, mitä häntä pelkääväiset halajavat, ja kuulee heidän huutonsa, ja auttaa heitä.
verses.king_james: He will fulfil the desire of them that fear him: he also will hear their cry, and will save them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Custodit Dominus omnes diligentes se,  et omnes peccatores disperdet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שׁוֹמֵ֣ר יְ֭הֹוָה אֶת־כׇּל־אֹהֲבָ֑יו וְאֵ֖ת כׇּל־הָרְשָׁעִ֣ים יַשְׁמִֽיד׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord keepeth all them that love him; but all the wicked he will destroy.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra varjelee kaikkia, jotka häntä rakastavat, ja hukuttaa kaikki jumalattomat.
verses.king_james: The Lord preserveth all them that love him: but all the wicked will he destroy.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laudationem Domini loquetur os meum ;  et benedicat omnis caro nomini sancto ejus in sæculum, et in sæculum sæculi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תְּהִלַּ֥ת יְהֹוָ֗ה יְֽדַבֶּ֫ר־פִּ֥י וִיבָרֵ֣ךְ כׇּל־בָּ֭שָׂר שֵׁ֥ם קׇדְשׁ֗וֹ לְעוֹלָ֥ם וָעֶֽד׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: My mouth shall speak the praise of the Lord: and let all flesh bless his holy name forever; yea, for ever and ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun suuni pitää puhuman Herran kiitoksen, ja kaikki liha kunnioittakaan hänen pyhää nimeänsä, aina ja ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: My mouth shall speak the praise of the Lord: and let all flesh bless his holy name for ever and ever.
